/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++17 -Wall -std=c++17 -O3 -fopenmp -pthread  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/run_kitti_stereo.dir/run_kitti_stereo.cpp.o  -o ../../bin/run_kitti_stereo  -Wl,-rpath,/home/he/deeploop_slam/lib:/home/he/opencv3/lib:/home/he/Pangolin/build/src:/home/he/caffe/build/lib:/opt/ros/noetic/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu ../../lib/libmyslam.so /home/he/opencv3/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.3.4.8 /home/he/opencv3/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.3.4.8 /home/he/opencv3/lib/libopencv_ml.so.3.4.8 /home/he/opencv3/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.3.4.8 /home/he/opencv3/lib/libopencv_shape.so.3.4.8 /home/he/opencv3/lib/libopencv_stitching.so.3.4.8 /home/he/opencv3/lib/libopencv_superres.so.3.4.8 /home/he/opencv3/lib/libopencv_videostab.so.3.4.8 /home/he/opencv3/lib/libopencv_viz.so.3.4.8 /home/he/Pangolin/build/src/libpangolin.so -lGL -lGLU -lGLEW -lglut -lg2o_core -lg2o_stuff -lg2o_types_sba -lg2o_solver_csparse -lg2o_csparse_extension -Wl,-Bstatic -lgtest -lgtest_main -Wl,-Bdynamic -lglog /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgflags.so.2.2.2 -lpthread -lcxsparse /home/he/caffe/build/lib/libcaffe.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.71.0 /home/he/opencv3/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.3.4.8 /home/he/opencv3/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.3.4.8 /home/he/opencv3/lib/libopencv_flann.so.3.4.8 /home/he/opencv3/lib/libopencv_photo.so.3.4.8 /home/he/opencv3/lib/libopencv_video.so.3.4.8 /home/he/opencv3/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.3.4.8 /home/he/opencv3/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.3.4.8 /home/he/opencv3/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.3.4.8 /home/he/opencv3/lib/libopencv_core.so.3.4.8 -lrt -lOpenGL -lGLX -lGLU -lGLEW -lEGL -lSM -lICE -lX11 -lXext -lrt -lOpenGL -lGLX -lGLU -lGLEW -lEGL -lSM -lICE -lX11 -lXext -ldc1394 -lavcodec -lavformat -lavutil -lswscale -lavdevice /opt/ros/noetic/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librealsense2.so -lOpenNI -lOpenNI2 -lpng -lz -ljpeg -ltiff -lIlmImf -lzstd -llz4 -lpthread -lpthread
